title: lindernia bracteoides
intro: Lindernia bracteoides, also known as the false lipocarpha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Lindernia bracteoides is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, and it is also used to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
